---
title: "SLoafing_Final"
format:
  apaquarto-pdf:
    documentmode: man
    a4paper: true
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    keep-tex: false
editor: visual
lang: en

authors:
  - name: "Samuel Riess"
    corresponding: true
    orcid: "0000-0000-0000-0000"
    email: "Samuel.riess@campus.lmu.de"
    roles:
      - writing
      - conceptualization
    affiliations:
      - id: "lmu"
        name: "Ludwig-Maximilians-Universität München, Munich, Germany"
        department: "Department of Psychology"
---
